channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-4423] Tracking of patches from upstream kernel to Lustre client
item.description: I am tired of opening a new ticket every time thee is such a patch, so this is going to be the master ticket for those changes.
item.summary: Tracking of patches from upstream kernel to Lustre client

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: This has been replaced by LU-9679

Oleg Drokin (green@whamcloud.com) merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/36650/
Subject: LU-4423 lustre: don't declare extern variables in C files.
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: 1a7720934dfb3105afd2f025c953bea2167d4e5d

Neil Brown (neilb@suse.de) uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/36650
Subject: LU-4423 lustre: don't declare extern variables in C files.
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 0744db86657230252be79d764141b2cda6a1ed95

Oleg Drokin (oleg.drokin@intel.com) merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/31707/
Subject: LU-4423 obdclass: use workqueue for zombie management
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: 135fea8fa986d7abf107953b5b9a57170a418eda

Dmitry Eremin (dmitry.eremin@intel.com) uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/31748
Subject: LU-4423 llite: change sai_thread to sai_task
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: dc6f59edcf5a2edeedec96cc445bd036f9d56043
I'm mostly focused on work with reducing threads number. This work is related to LU-9441 and LU-9114.

Dmitry if you manage to get the l_wait_event changes ported please place them under the LU-10467 ticket. Thanks for doing this. While you do that I'm working in the other direction of porting to upstream.

Dmitry Eremin (dmitry.eremin@intel.com) uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/31734

Oleg Drokin (oleg.drokin@intel.com) merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/31418/
Subject: LU-4423 lov: use correct env in lov_io_data_version_end()
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: 893e5a99e766ab97e95217b7b201b9d293bed6e0

Oleg Drokin (oleg.drokin@intel.com) merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/31273/
Subject: LU-4423 lnet: free a struct kib_conn outside of the kiblnd_destroy_conn()
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: da79fe86ca985164dc5973d3efdfafeac6b9b8f5

The latest patch posted here is a hot fix. Neil found a long buried bug that was breaking the upstream client. For some reason it seems to be not as large an issue with the lustre-release branch.  It is a much needed fix tho.

Wanted to make this a blocker due to http://review.whamcloud.com/19342 patch which is fixing memory corruption, but we can't do that for all of the patches on this ticket. If we get close to release and that patch isn't landed, or if the patch is refreshed, it would make sense to move it to a separate ticket with appropriate priority.

With the back porting of the upstream patches which touch only style and checkpatch.pl issues I think the best approach is using a topic branch and merging it after the feature freeze to avoid any potential conflicts with landed things.

Commit: f0c8f2aeb2aa5593c7c61961080896e12cd21000
llite: Integer overflow in ll_ioctl_fiemap: http://review.whamcloud.com/11413
obdecho: bitwise vs logical typo: http://review.whamcloud.com/11410

libcfs: Replace filp_sync with vfs_fsync: http://review.whamcloud.com/10122 - needs work
remove ll_readlink as unnecessary: http://review.whamcloud.com/10123
fix deadloop in ksocknal_push: http://review.whamcloud.com/#/c/10128

gss: fix checkpatch warning: http://review.whamcloud.com/10118
gss: Fix typo in sec_gss.c: http://review.whamcloud.com/10119
ptlrpc: Fix function prototypes: http://review.whamcloud.com/10120
style: Change comment to fit within 80 columns: http://review.whamcloud.com/10121
libcfs: Replace filp_sync with vfs_fsync: http://review.whamcloud.com/10122
remove ll_readlink as unnecessary: http://review.whamcloud.com/10123
lnet: don't open-code kernel_recvmsg(): http://review.whamcloud.com/10124
lnet: switch to kernel_sendmsg(): http://review.whamcloud.com/10125
o2iblnd: use is_vmalloc_addr: http://review.whamcloud.com/8953

obdclass: fix return value check in capa_hmac() : http://review.whamcloud.com/8681

ptlrpc: fix potential NULL pointer dereference : http://review.whamcloud.com/8682
